name: Tempting Tuna Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (7 oz.) tuna, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Alternate layers of bread and cheese in a well-buttered 9-inch square baking dish. Begin with bread and end with cheese.
2. Sprinkle tuna over all the layers.
3. In a small saucepan, cook onion and celery in butter until the vegetables are tender. Remove from heat.
4. Blend the cooked onion and celery mixture with milk, eggs, and salt.
5. Pour the blended mixture evenly over the tuna in the baking dish.
6. Bake at 350°F for puffy, lightly browned baked goods. Makes 4-6 servings.
